steps.title: Identify the sentence role
steps.content: The underlined sentence claims that the map shows vast topographic knowledge, then supports that claim with named mountains, named rivers, and a first-known sketch of the Missouri River drainage network.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: A refers to other tribes, which appear after the underlined sentence. B and D introduce interests or uses the sentence never discusses. The sentence gives reasons the map is impressive. The answer is C.
